name: Ferrofluid Ocean
description: Ocean-portion-scale ferrofluid surface: constant Rosensweig spike lattice over Gerstner swell, lit by mirror-reflects-procedural-sky aurora (D-126 / D-127). Audio routing per round 65 (V.9 Session 4.5c): bass_energy_dev → spike height; arousal → swell amplitude; vocals_pitch_hz → aurora palette; drums_energy_dev_smoothed → aurora intensity; accumulated_audio_time × arousal → aurora drift.
author: Matt
